design_decisions: Used itertools.combinations to optimize pairwise interactions (O(n^2) -> O(n(n-1)/2))
Added a whitelist regex for table names in get_storage_size
Escaped < and > in HTML report JSON injection
Replaced os.system with subprocess.run in benchmarks
Modified n_unique to robustly identify count columns across backends
Added warning reporting for histogram failures instead of silent pass
Added type hint to ProfileReport.analysis to satisfy 'ty' type checking
results: All 7 findings addressed, verified with tests, and quality checks passed.
